calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-14-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-10-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Tito Torres, Esq. for appeared for plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority.
No appearance by defendant Floyd Jackson.
Default entered against defendant on February 4, 2008.
Order waiving appearance of witness at prove-up hearing filed on March 27, 2008.
Request for Judicial Notice filed March 26, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority and against the Defaulted Defendant FLOYD JACKSON as follows:

Defendant FLOYD JACKSON is enjoined and restrained from being within 150 yards of any and all San Francisco Housing Authority property, and is therefore ordered to stay away at least 150 yards from any and all San Francisco Housing Authority property, perpetually pursuant to California Code of Civil Procedure Section 526. Defendant FLOYD JACKSON is enjoined and restrained from entering into, or onto any San Francisco Housing Authority property, perpetually pursuant to California Code of Civil Procedure Section 526.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
